name: memopilot-iq
description: MemoPilot IQ — a self-curating persistent-memory agent (Qwen Cloud Global AI Hackathon, Track 1: MemoryAgent).

scripts.seed: cd backend && cross-env SEED_DEMO=1 uvicorn app.main:app --port 8000
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
